# bhorisdhanjal.github.io

This is my professional academic website built with the Jekyll Academic theme.

## Features
- Clean, professional design for PhD portfolio
- Projects section with research work
- Blog with search and feeds
- Responsive layout
- MathJax and syntax highlighting support

## Setup
1. Install Ruby and Bundler
2. Run `bundle install`
3. Run `bundle exec jekyll serve` to preview locally
4. Push to main branch for GitHub Pages

See `_config.yml` for site settings.
